name: Tivoly S.A.
summary: Tivoly S.A. designs, manufactures, and sells cutting tools and associated products and services for manufacturing and maintenance professionals, tradespeople, and private individuals in France and internationally. The company offers cutting tools, including HSS, Carbide, PCD, and diamond precision tools for machining alloys, metals, and composites; and hand-held power tool accessories to equip drills, screw guns, sanders, and jig saws or circular saws to work with materials, such as concrete, metal, and wood. The company was founded in 1917 and is based in Tours-en-Savoie, France.
